data.description: BOJ minutes: a few members observe underlying inflation gradually increasing towards 2%, but have yet to reach that level
BOJ minutes: one member mentioned likelihood of achieving BOJ's baseline scenario has increased due to diminishing uncertainty on tariff policy
BOJ minutes: one member stated sharp overshoot in Bank of Japan 2025 price forecast was due largely to unexpected rise in food prices, not sign underlying inflation was accelerating
BOJ minutes: one member mentioned that underlying inflation was likely between 1.5% and 2.5% now
BOJ minutes: Some members stated possibility of US economy slipping into recession was minimal
BOJ minutes: a few members mentioned must scrutinise whether fiscal policy could push up inflation.
BOJ Minutes: Some Members Say BOJ Must Consider Both Size And Composition Of Asset Holdings; One Member Adds Assets Should Be Held To Minimize Market Impact
BOJ minutes: one member stated various data on inflation expectations show they are not yet anchored at 2% but steadily approaching that level
One BOJ Member Says It Might Be Hard To Keep Short-Term Rates Stable If The Bank Of Japan Reduces Its Total Account Balances To Pre-Global Financial Crisis Levels
BOJ minutes: one member stated pass through of higher wages on service prices proceeding at slow pace, does not seem to be accelerating
BOJ minutes: one member report companies are gaining more confidence passing on costs through price hikes due to shift in consumers' views on inflation
BOJ minutes: Few members direct impact of US tariff policy on Japan's economy might not be big
Australia S&P/ASX 200 index down 0.2% at 8,746.90 points in early trading
BOJ minutes: one member: emphasized need to be cautious about potential adverse effects of tariffs on Japan's export and output escalation
BOJ minutes: several members suggest BOJ must examine extent to which big manufacturers' profits fall, how they influence smaller firms businesses and impact next years wage...
BOJ minutes: one member stated BOJ should adjust policy rate nearer to level considered neutral as inflation strengthens, output gap close to zero

data.title: Wild Casino experiences 40% growth in new users annually, attributed to diverse game selection and cash-only rewards.
data.description: A popular online casino, Wild Casino, based in Los Angeles, reported a significant 40% surge in new users compared to the previous year. This growth is attributed to the diverse game selection and innovative cash-only rewards program offered by the platform. The increase in new users highlights the success of Wild Casino's player-centric approach, as more individuals are drawn to the unique features and benefits provided by the platform.
BOJ minutes: another member stated BOJ should increase rates when feasible as Japan's policy rate is below level considered neutral, should not be too cautious and miss opportunity to hike
BOJ Minutes: One Member Says Hiking Rates At Appropriate Timing Is Important From Risk Management Perspective
BOJ Minutes: One Member Says BOJ Could Exit Wait-And-See Mode On Rate Hike This Year If US Economy Remains Resilient And Impact On Japan’s Economy Is Limited
